name: Trade Wins by the World Trade Centers Association
description: Conversations that educate and inspire our constituents as they create vibrant ecosystems of economic activity through their access to real estate, trade services, hospitality, and networking.

recent_episodes.title: 26:Success Stories from the 2021-2022 WTCA Champions Award Winners
recent_episodes.description:
Highlights from the conversation:

What it means to be a winner (1:30)What makes your WTC unique (20:46)Perspectives on global trade (29:19)Anecdotes to share (37:42)

Trade Wins is a podcast designed specifically to be thought-provoking and to provide insights from leading experts to help us navigate today’s changing environment. We aim to contribute to the empowerment of our global membership and their business networks in the world of global trade and investment.

score_reason: Interviews business leaders about international trade and economic ecosystems, could fit his agency-building and traditional industry transformation story.

key_themes: Global trade and international business strategy
enrichment.relevant_episode: 15: Cities of the Future and Civilization 3.0, with Parag Khanna — Both guests focus on how traditional sectors must evolve using emerging technologies (AI for Andreas, digital futures for Parag) to compete in a rapidly changing global economy.
enrichment.coverage_gap: How traditional industries (agriculture, commodity boards, manufacturing) are actually using AI and data-driven decision-making to compete globally — the podcast has touched on digital transformation broadly but not on AI adoption in legacy sectors.
enrichment.suggested_hook: From Ogilvy to agricultural AI: How traditional industries stop guessing and start competing using data and AI.
